evidence_summary: Reviewed the integrated round-298 worktree. The focused stringReplace test proves public Prelude stringReplace : String -> String -> String -> String backed by __string_replace, with left-to-right non-overlapping Unicode-scalar substring replacement, no-match preservation, and empty-needle no-op through source checking, run-program, backend LLVM/object validation, emit-native/native object validation, and linked native execution. Primitive inventory, planned neighbor text/native checks, evidence scans, claim audit, git diff --check, cabal build all, cabal test, and thesis gate passed. Generated depfile churn from reviewer-run native checks was restored; controller state is only the active round marker.
